title: Changed: Survive Protocol
description: Survival expansion for the Changed-Minecraft Mod.
body:
# Changed: Survive Protocol
[![Available on CurseForge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/1aec26abb75544baec37249f42008b2fcc0e731f/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/changed-survive-protocol)   [![Available on Modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/1aec26abb75544baec37249f42008b2fcc0e731f/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/changed-survive-protocol)


Changed: Survive Protocol is a survival-focused addon for Changed: Minecraft Mod.

Instead of treating transfur as a simple instant fail-state, this addon builds a full survival loop around contamination, infection, lucidity, lab work, cure crafting, stabilization, and spreading latex infestations.

## Warning

This addon requires Changed: Minecraft Mod.

Changed contains themes and content that may not be suitable for all audiences. If Changed is not for you, this addon probably is not either.

## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Forge 47.4.0+
- Changed: Minecraft Mod 0.15.4+

## Main Features

### Reworked Infection Survival

Latex attacks now goes through multiple stages:

- Coverage builds first
- Infection begins after coverage gets severe enough
- Transfur happens only after infection reaches the limit

Coverage can be cleaned before it becomes a bigger problem. Infection requires actual treatment.

### Lab-Based Cure Loop

Surviving infection means preparation.

- Use the Sampling Scalpel to collect a latex sample
- Analyze samples with the Microscope
- Identify the active latex strain
- Process the strand in the Latex Centrifuge
- Create cure doses for matching infections

Cure doses reduce active infection. But once you are transformed, nothing can cure you. (Unless you use other mods or cheat commands.)

### Latex Centrifuge And Microscope

Adds new lab machines for strain identification and treatment crafting.

### Lucidity System

Being latex is not free anymore.

Latex forms must maintain lucidity. If lucidity collapses, there will be consequences.

Food, latex type, sleep location, and other behavior can affect how stable your form is.

### Stabilization

If you want to keep a latex form safely, try stabilization.

Stabilization items can settle a matching current latex form, making that form permanent instead of letting lucidity spiral forever.

### Latex Hearts And Nodes

Latex infestations have been expanded into a more dangerous world system.

- Latex Hearts spreads latex to nearby blocks
- Latex Nodes protect their heart
- Infested areas can grow over time
- Destroy nodes first, then break the heart
- Once the heart is gone, its latex can begin decaying away

Latex Heart behavior is fully configurable via gamerules, so packs and servers can tune how aggressive the system should be.

### Utility Items

Adds practical survival tools:

- Disinfectant Wipes
- Disinfectant Spray
- Latex Inhibitor
- Stabilizing Reagent
- Strand Cure Dose
- Cultured Latex Strand
- Stabilization Dose

## FAQ

### Is this an official Changed addon?

No. This is an addon for Changed: Minecraft Mod.

Changed belongs to DragonSnow. Changed: Minecraft Mod is by ltxprogrammer and contributors.

### Can this untransfur me?

Not directly.

The cure system is for active infection before a completed transfur. Once you are fully transfurred, cure doses will not undo it.

If you're looking for untransfur, check out other addons.

### Can servers use this?

Yes. The mod is client and server side.

Servers should install it on both sides along with the required Changed mod.

## Recommended Use

This addon is best for players or modpacks that want Changed gameplay to feel more dangerous, slower, and more mechanical.

If you want infection management, lab progression, environmental latex threats, and consequences for staying latex too long, this is the addon for that.
